strengths: Experience with dbt and data modeling
weaknesses: Limited/no Azure or Microsoft Fabric experience
Less than required years in formal data engineering roles
improvement_bullets: Architected and deployed data pipelines while implementing rigorous data governance protocols to ensure security and compliance, consistently maintaining data quality standards through Great Expectations and automated validation checks.
Led performance tuning of SQL queries and BigQuery warehouse configurations, identifying bottlenecks to reduce latency and optimize cloud resource utilization by 25%.

Developed expertise in cross-platform cloud data migrations, demonstrating the ability to adapt core engineering principles (ELT/ETL) to enterprise-grade environments similar to Microsoft Azure/Fabric.

Integrated diverse data sources, including API-based SaaS platforms, by designing scalable schemas that enable clean data flow into analytical environments, mirroring enterprise requirements for systems like Salesforce or ERP integrations.

Actively pursuing Microsoft Fabric and Azure Data Engineering certifications to further align my technical skill set with advanced enterprise cloud architectures and modern data ecosystem best practices.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Engineer opportunity with Kimco Realty Corporation. I am interested in this opportunity because of Kimco's commitment to modernizing its enterprise data platform to drive meaningful business impact. What interests me about working for Kimco is its reputation as a leader in the real estate sector and its focus on leveraging cloud-native solutions to enable high-quality decision-making. I believe my expertise in building scalable ELT pipelines and my proficiency in modern data stack technologies like dbt and Airflow would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by prioritizing automation and data reliability. In fact, while building a production-grade ELT pipeline at a previous project, I designed a star schema in BigQuery and implemented Great Expectations for data quality validation. This resulted in a robust, automated reporting foundation that drastically reduced query times and improved analytical accuracy. Ultimately, I know that the Data Engineer role at Kimco Realty Corporation would allow me to bring my data modeling expertise to your enterprise architecture initiatives. Additionally, my role as a software developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my cross-functional collaboration skills. I worked closely with engineers and product stakeholders to sync data across complex systems, leading to a 60% improvement in data accuracy. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in SQL and Python in working on enterprise-scale data infrastructure at Kimco. I know that my proficiency in cloud data engineering and my focus on high-performance architecture align with what it takes to succeed at the Data Engineer role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
